summary: OCB TITAN ERP - Owner Control & Stock SSOT Implementation Testing. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All module cleanup and rename verified. Stock Single Source of Truth (SSOT) confirmed - stock calculated from stock_movements only.

STOCK_SSOT.get_stock_ssot: PASS - GET /api/owner/stock/{item_id} returns stock calculated from stock_movements with source='stock_movements (SSOT)'
STOCK_SSOT.get_stock_card: PASS - GET /api/owner/stock-card/{item_id} returns movements with running balance
STOCK_SSOT.get_stock_by_branch: PASS - GET /api/owner/stock-by-branch/{item_id} returns stock breakdown per branch with source='stock_movements (SSOT)'

OWNER_EDIT_CONTROL.edit_item_creates_audit: PASS - PUT /api/owner/edit/item/{item_id} updates item and creates audit log with valuation recalculation
OWNER_EDIT_CONTROL.edit_po_creates_audit: PASS - PUT /api/owner/edit/purchase-order/{po_id} updates PO and creates audit log

AUDIT_LOGS.get_audit_logs: PASS - GET /api/owner/audit-logs returns list with old_value and new_value JSON
AUDIT_LOGS.get_audit_detail: PASS - GET /api/owner/audit-logs/{record_id} returns history for specific record

ERROR_HANDLING.auth_required: PASS - Owner endpoints require authentication (401/403 without token)

MODULE_CLEANUP_FRONTEND.approval_center_hidden: PASS - 'Approval Center' is correctly HIDDEN from sidebar
MODULE_CLEANUP_FRONTEND.sales_target_hidden: PASS - 'Sales Target' is correctly HIDDEN from sidebar
MODULE_CLEANUP_FRONTEND.komisi_hidden: PASS - 'Komisi' is correctly HIDDEN from sidebar
MODULE_CLEANUP_FRONTEND.warehouse_renamed: PASS - 'Warehouse Control' renamed to 'Branch Inventory Control'

stock_ssot.description: Stock Single Source of Truth - All stock is calculated from stock_movements collection only
stock_ssot.evidence: API responses include source='stock_movements (SSOT)' confirming data origin

owner_edit_control.description: Owner can edit any transaction with full audit trail
owner_edit_control.recalculation_engine: Automatic recalculation of stock movements, journals, AP/AR, and inventory valuation

audit_system.description: Full audit trail for all owner edits
audit_system.filtering: Supports filtering by module, record_id, user_id, action, date range

module_cleanup.implementation: Sidebar.jsx properly hides/shows modules based on business requirements

critical_code_review_comments: owner_control.py: Well-structured with proper permission checks (require_owner), audit logging, and recalculation engine integration
stock_ssot.py: Correctly implements SSOT pattern - all stock reads use aggregation pipeline on stock_movements collection
recalculation_engine.py: Comprehensive recalculation for stock movements, journals, AP/AR when owner edits transactions
Sidebar.jsx: Clean implementation - hidden modules are commented out, 'Branch Inventory Control' properly renamed from 'Warehouse Control'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Owner Control APIs fully tested and working. Stock SSOT confirmed - stock calculated from stock_movements only. Audit logs working correctly. Frontend module cleanup verified: Approval Center, Sales Target, Komisi are HIDDEN; Warehouse Control renamed to Branch Inventory Control.
screenshots_taken: .screenshots/02_dashboard_after_login_iter47.png - Dashboard with sidebar showing 'Branch Inventory Control'
